[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011110011 6
1 111001101 6
2 010010001 3
3 111010111 7
4 110010011 5
5 111000101 5
6 111111111 a
7 111111111 a

01 110011111 7
